expectations.evidence: Four named pillars: hidden cost of manual finance ops, compliance & controls, benchmarks & proof, operator playbooks.
Calendar has a dedicated Funnel column with TOFU/MOFU/BOFU per row.

expectations.text: Applies a value-heavy content mix ratio
Calendar includes the reference fields: pillar, funnel stage, format, working title, CTA
expectations.evidence: Table columns: Pillar, Funnel, Format, Working title, CTA — all present across 8 rows.

expectations.text: Asks 2-3 scoping questions or states explicit assumptions (medium stakes)
expectations.evidence: Opens with a one-line assumptions block (audience/goal/resources) and closes with sharpening questions.
